title: The Hobosexual Man Is Everywhere, And He Loves 30-Something Women | Just Getting Good

In this episode, Chelsea speaks with Mel Hamlett, a journalist and TikToker/YouTuber and absolute expert on the topic of flop men. They talk about living abroad as Americans, finding yourself after years of being "one of the boys," and

title: Abortion Was Just One Piece
description:
We’re still positively reeling from how powerful Chelsea’s interview with Ros was. A lifelong activist and retired professor living here, in NYC, Rosalind “Ros” Petchesky spoke with Chelsea on our fan favorite podcast, Just Getting Good, about coping with this fraught political moment, her work as an activist, reproductive justice, and more. 

Her episode has been flagged for political content (😒), so we really hope you’ll watch her episode to fight the censoring algorithm.

📌 Check out her full episode via our channel’s “Just Getting Good” playlist


#activism #abortion #abortionaccess #abortionlaw #roevwadeoverturned #reproductivehealth #reproductivejustice #justice #law #politics #politicalactivism #politicalactivist #activist

title: Social Perks of Being Single
description:
The media tells the story that every part of being single is hell or embarrassing. Well, we disagree. As a matter of fact, being single carries some social perks most tend to overlook but miss when it’s gone!

Alexa Claire, TFD Content & Production Manager, gets into in episode 1 of our Single Tax series, “What Nobody Tells You About Being The Single Friend”. Watch on our channel!

#single #dating #relationship #relationships #dates #singlewoman #singlewomen #lifestyle

title: SHEIN’s Everlane Takeover
description:
We’re seeing ethical fashion companies balancing the tightrope of profit and ethics less and less. It’s time to talk about it. 

Our friend and money expert, Kara Perez, dives into the bleak reality behind the corporations that market themselves as "ethical” in her video “Why The Everlane/SHEIN Deal Feels So Gross” (watch on our channel!).

#ethical #ethicalfashion #ethicalmanufacturing #profit #profitandloss #fashion #consumerinsights #consumerism #consumer #economy #shopping #shoppingonline #shein #everlane #fastfashion #fashiontrends #smallbusiness #environment #environmental #ecofriendly #pollution

title: I Saved Six Figures While Making Less Than $50K Per Year
description:
Thanks to our good friends at Monarch for sponsoring this video! Get 50% off Monarch's Core Plan with code TFD50: https://bit.ly/YT062626

Kara Perez is back to share a personal story: how she saved up a net worth of over $100K while making less than $50K (and later increasing that net worth to $200K just two years later), including all the numbers, strategies, and real-life details that got her there.
